title: Spring Animation Demo
description: A small DAG (load → clean+validate → analyze → model+viz → report) built one step per commit. Each commit is captured by the watcher and pushed to the UI via SSE, so the frontend can showcase the Spring entrance and edge-draw animations on a live trace. Each step declares assets so the StepCard asset tray renders.

step_1.name: Load Data
step_1.does: Read the raw dataset from source and stage it for downstream steps.

step_2.name: Clean
step_2.does: Drop missing values, normalise schema, write a small change log.

step_3.name: Validate
step_3.does: Sanity-check column types, ranges, and distribution shape.

step_4.name: Analyze
step_4.does: Compute descriptive statistics joining the cleaned data with the validated schema.

step_5.name: Model
step_5.does: Train a baseline classifier and record cross-validated metrics.

step_6.name: Visualise
step_6.does: Render a confusion matrix and per-feature distribution panels.

step_7.name: Report
step_7.does: Compose the final report from the model metrics and visualisations.

deliverable.description: Final HTML report bundling model results and figures.
